summary: Frontend Review Agent completed review of FR-PERS-001 (Issue #13) implementation. PR #48 was merged into main. All 3 implementation files verified on main branch: ActionBar.tsx (Save button data-testid=btn-save, async save, QuotaExceededError handling, 3s/5s auto-dismiss), Notification.tsx (error detection via includes('error'), role=status aria-live=polite), persistenceService.ts (saveModel/loadModel via LocalForage, schema v1.0.0, PersistedModel interface). All 4 test cases (T-FE-PERS-001-01 through T-FE-PERS-001-04) are present and correctly structured. Verdict: APPROVED — no blocking issues. 3 minor non-blocking observations noted. Ready for human review gate.

artifacts.name: ActionBar.tsx
artifacts.description: Save/Load/Export/Import buttons with async handlers, QuotaExceededError handling, data-testid=btn-save, aria-labels

artifacts.name: Notification.tsx
artifacts.description: Auto-dismissing notification overlay, error detection via includes('error'), role=status aria-live=polite

artifacts.name: persistenceService.ts
artifacts.description: saveModel/loadModel via LocalForage with schema versioning v1.0.0 and PersistedModel interface

artifacts.name: T-FE-PERS-001-01
artifacts.description: Unit: Save serializes all brick data (position, color, type, rotation) + schema version

artifacts.name: T-FE-PERS-001-02
artifacts.description: Integration: Save completes within 500ms for 1,000 bricks (mocked localforage)

artifacts.name: T-FE-PERS-001-03
artifacts.description: Behavioral: Clicking Save shows success notification via full App render

artifacts.name: T-FE-PERS-001-04
artifacts.description: Unit: Save shows error when storage is full (QuotaExceededError)

artifacts.name: PR #48 (merged)
artifacts.description: [area:frontend] Implement FR-PERS-001 Save Model — merged into main

artifacts.name: Review Comment on Issue #13
artifacts.description: Full frontend review verdict posted to Issue #13

human_review_required.title: Performance test uses mocked localforage — timing is not realistic
human_review_required.description: T-FE-PERS-001-02 mocks localforage.setItem to resolve immediately. The test validates serialization overhead only, not actual IndexedDB write latency. Acceptable for jsdom environment but a clarifying comment would help future maintainers.

human_review_required.title: loadModel does not validate schema version on load
human_review_required.description: loadModel returns model.bricks without checking model.version. A TODO comment for future migration validation would signal intent. Non-blocking for v1.0.0.

human_review_required.title: Auto-dismiss ownership is in ActionBar, not Notification
human_review_required.description: The setTimeout for auto-dismiss lives in ActionBar.notify(), not in Notification.tsx. This is architecturally cleaner (store-driven) but slightly diverges from the spec's implied ownership. Non-blocking — preferred pattern.

recommended_actions: Human reviewer: verify PR #48 is merged and implementation is on main branch
Human reviewer: confirm all 4 test cases T-FE-PERS-001-01 through T-FE-PERS-001-04 pass in CI
Human reviewer: optionally address 3 non-blocking observations (HRI-001, HRI-002, HRI-003) in a follow-up
Human reviewer: close Issue #13 once satisfied with implementation
Next agent: proceed to backend or next frontend feature per roadmap
